LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelCallAllHomeDesc: Order every available fleshbeast on this map to return through the tunnel to the source maw.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelNoFleshbeastsToReturn: No available fleshbeasts on this map can return through the tunnel.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelCallAllHomeResult: Sent {0} fleshbeasts home through the tunnel. Skipped: {1}.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelCollapseExitDesc: Collapse this tunnel exit and permanently destroy its location. Everything left there will be lost.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelCollapseExitConfirm: Collapse this flesh tunnel and permanently destroy the linked location? All pawns and objects left there will be lost.
LanguageData.FB_FleshTunnelNoWorldAnchor: The flesh tunnel cannot find a world location for this pocket map.
